examples.title: Pseudocode: Swing GUI
examples.code:
CREATE WINDOW
SET TITLE "My Swing Application"
SET SIZE 400x300
SET VISIBLE TRUE
ADD BUTTON "Click Me"
ADD LABEL "Hello World"
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates creating a basic Swing GUI with a window, button, and label.

examples.title: Java: Swing GUI
examples.description: Creating a basic Swing GUI in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code creates a basic Swing GUI with a window, button, and label.

examples.title: Java: Swing Event Handling
examples.description: Handling events in a Swing GUI
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates event handling in a Swing GUI by adding an action listener to a button.
